# Vardhini Vastu

> Professional Vastu Shastra consultancy by Raghavendra Hebbur, Bangalore. Uses the proprietary VIDS™ (Vardhini Integrated Direction System) — degree-accurate 16-zone analysis with zero-demolition corrections. 10+ years, 800+ documented transformations. Serves clients in Bangalore, across India, and internationally via online consultation.

Raghavendra Hebbur is a Certified Geo Master, Lecher Antenna practitioner, and Vastu Shastra expert. He identifies geopathic stress zones (Hartmann grid, Curry grid, underground water streams) using the Lecher Antenna instrument. All vastu corrections are non-demolition — no structural changes required.

Contact: +91 97391 05574 | WhatsApp: wa.me/919739105574
Website: https://vardhinivastu.in
Location: Ajit Layout, Virgo Nagar, Bangalore, Karnataka 560049

## Services
- [Home Vastu Consultation](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-consultant-bangalore-contact/): Full residential vastu analysis using VIDS™ 16-zone system. Covers all rooms, entry direction, brahmasthan, geopathic stress scan.
- [Office & Commercial Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-office): Workplace energy mapping, seating direction, cash counter placement, MD cabin zone, team productivity zones.
- [Online Vastu Consultation](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-consultant-bangalore-contact/): Remote consultation via floor plan + compass readings. Serves clients across India and internationally.
- [Geopathic Stress Survey](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-geopathic-stress): Lecher Antenna detection of underground water streams, Hartmann grid, Curry grid, and electromagnetic stress zones.
- [Plot & Pre-Purchase Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-plot): Direction analysis, corner defect assessment, T-junction evaluation before property purchase.

## Core Vastu Knowledge (Educational)
- [What is Vastu Shastra](https://vardhinivastu.in/what-is-vastu-shastra): Origin, principles, Panchabhutas (five elements), and the Vastu Purusha Mandala explained.
- [Vastu Directions](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-directions): All 8 directions — governing deities, elements, and zone functions in the 16-zone VIDS™ system.
- [Vastu Five Elements](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-five-elements): Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Space — how each element maps to zones and affects occupant wellbeing.
- [Vastu Purusha Mandala](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-purusha-mandala): The cosmic grid underlying Vastu Shastra architecture.
- [Brahmasthan Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/brahmasthan-vastu): The central zone — rules, defects, and corrections.
- [Vastu Remedies](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-remedies): Zero-demolition corrections — crystals, pyramids, colours, plants, mirrors, yantras.
- [Vastu vs Feng Shui](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-vs-feng-shui): Key differences between the two systems of spatial energy.
- [Geopathic Stress](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-geopathic-stress): Earth radiation zones and their health effects — detection and neutralisation.

## House Directions
- [North Facing House Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/north-facing-house-vastu): Kuber zone — wealth, career, water element placement rules.
- [East Facing House Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/east-facing-house-vastu): Indra zone — solar energy, health, main entrance guidelines.
- [South Facing House Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/south-facing-house-vastu): Yama zone — dispelling myths, correct entry positions.
- [West Facing House Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/west-facing-house-vastu): Varuna zone — nourishment, satisfaction, water element.
- [North East Facing House](https://vardhinivastu.in/north-east-facing-house-vastu): Eshanya zone — spirituality, highest positive energy direction.
- [South East Facing House](https://vardhinivastu.in/south-east-facing-house-vastu): Agni zone — fire element, kitchen placement.
- [South West Facing House](https://vardhinivastu.in/south-west-facing-house-vastu): Nairuthi zone — stability, master bedroom zone.
- [North West Facing House](https://vardhinivastu.in/north-west-facing-house-vastu): Vayu zone — movement, guest rooms, air element.
- [Vastu for Flat/Apartment](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-flat-apartment): Vastu analysis for multi-storey apartments and flats.

## Residential Rooms
- [Vastu for Kitchen](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-kitchen): South-East fire zone, platform direction, gas stove placement.
- [Vastu for Master Bedroom](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-master-bedroom): South-West zone, bed head direction, couple harmony.
- [Vastu for Living Room](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-living-room): North-East or East zone, sofa placement, TV wall.
- [Vastu for Pooja Room](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-pooja-room): North-East zone, idol direction, materials, lighting.
- [Vastu for Main Entrance](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-main-entrance): Door direction by facing, threshold rules, nameplate.
- [Vastu for Bathroom/Toilet](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-bathroom): North-West or South zone placement, toilet seat direction.
- [Vastu for Study Room](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-study-room): North-East or East, study table direction, concentration enhancement.
- [Vastu for Children's Room](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-childrens-room): West or South-West zone, study desk direction.
- [Vastu for Dining Room](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-dining-room): West zone, table shape, seating direction.
- [Vastu for Staircase](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-staircase): South, South-West, or West placement, clockwise direction.
- [Vastu for Balcony](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-balcony): North or East open zone, heavy planters warning.
- [Vastu for Colors](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-colors): Zone-wise colour recommendations for walls and interiors.
- [Vastu for Mirrors](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-mirrors): North or East wall placement, bedroom mirror rules.
- [Vastu for Water Tank](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-water-tank): Underground — North-East; overhead — South-West or West.
- [Vastu for Basement](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-basement): North-East or East, permitted uses, prohibited uses.

## Commercial Vastu
- [Vastu for Office](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-office): MD cabin, reception, cash counter, workstation directions.

- [Vastu for Restaurant](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-restaurant): Kitchen zone, seating, cash counter, footfall energy.
- [Vastu for Clinic](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-clinic): Doctor's seating, waiting area, medicine storage zones.

- [Vastu for Warehouse](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-warehouse): Storage zone, entry direction, heavy goods placement.

- [Vastu for Pregnancy](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-for-pregnancy): Safe bedroom zone, prohibited directions during pregnancy.

## Corner Defects & Plot Issues
- [NE Cut Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-ne-cut): North-East corner cut — effects and zero-demolition remedies.
- [SW Cut Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-sw-cut): South-West cut — stability issues and corrections.
- [T-Junction Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-t-junction): Road hitting main door — energy impact and remedies.
- [L-Shaped Plot](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-l-shaped-plot): Missing zone analysis and correction.
- [Irregular Plot Vastu](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-irregular-plot): Non-square plots — assessment methodology.
- [Geopathic Stress](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-geopathic-stress): Underground radiation zones — Hartmann, Curry, water streams.

## Vastu Objects & Remedies
- [Vastu Pyramids](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-pyramid): Copper and multi-layer pyramids — placement and activation.
- [Vastu Crystals](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-crystals): Crystal placement by zone — Clear Quartz, Amethyst, Citrine.
- [Vastu Plants](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-plants): Tulsi, Money Plant, Bamboo — zone-wise placement.
- [Vastu Yantras](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-yantras): Sri Yantra, Vastu Yantra, Kuber Yantra — placement rules.
- [Wind Chimes](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-wind-chime): Metal vs bamboo, zone placement.
- [Vastu Fish Tank](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-fish-tank): North or North-East, fish count, water element.
- [Laughing Buddha](https://vardhinivastu.in/vastu-laughing-buddha): Placement direction, facing rules.
